title: Minecraft Trophies
description: When completing advancements, you get a trophy that you can place to show off!
body:
This mod has been archived. If I have more time I might be able to update in the future but there is no plan for updating any time soon.

This Forge mod gives you a trophy when you complete an advancement. The trophy looks like this:


**IMPORTANT NOTICE**

With the rewrite of this mod, I have changed the way that the blocks have been generated/work - Due to this, you cannot just install the new version and get your new blocks. You can use commands that are listed below to get your trophies if wanted.

All 2.0 changes can be found here: https://patch.joshepstein.co.uk/trophies

The name and the item changes based on what advancement the trophy is for.

Patch notes can be viewed here: patch.joshepstein.co.uk/trophies

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!

Made by JoshuaEpstein

[https://joshepstein.co.uk](https://joshepstein.co.uk)
